meta.caveats: search interest proxies the missing downstream color/accessory/print fields; overlap-inflated t at long lags; small independent-obs counts; runway shape/print untagged

color.Q1_runway_to_retail.best_proxy_used: runway trend-color share z -> color search z
color.Q1_runway_to_retail.one_line: runway trend-color emergence vs color search interest, best |t|=3.94 at +0mo (overlap-inflated)

color.Q2_retail_to_supplier.one_line: color demand vs pigment/dye equities (CE), best |t|=-2.41 at +4mo

color.Q3_tradeable.best_proxy_used: color search z -> wide equity sweep
color.Q3_tradeable.one_line: no candidate traded >=12 active months (a +-1z signal fires ~4x/yr) — too sparse to evaluate; no tradeable edge

accessories.Q1_runway_to_retail.best_proxy_used: runway accessory share z -> accessory search z
accessories.Q1_runway_to_retail.one_line: runway bag/shoe share vs accessory search, best |t|=3.19 at +9mo

accessories.Q2_retail_to_supplier.one_line: accessory demand vs MC.PA (leather/luxury parents), best |t|=-2.37 at +7mo

accessories.Q3_tradeable.one_line: best-of-246 IR=2.414 (DECK,+10mo) but selection-p=0.381, 0.49 of combos positive

silhouette.Q1_runway_to_retail.best_proxy_used: runway structured-share z -> silhouette search z
silhouette.Q1_runway_to_retail.one_line: runway tailoring/outerwear share vs silhouette search, best |t|=-1.76 at +6mo (category is a crude shape proxy)

silhouette.Q2_retail_to_supplier.best_proxy_used: n/a — shape has no material supplier
silhouette.Q2_retail_to_supplier.one_line: silhouette is a shape, not a material input — no fiber/commodity supplier maps to it

silhouette.Q3_tradeable.one_line: best-of-308 IR=1.512 (DECK,+11mo) but selection-p=0.905, 0.49 of combos positive

prints.Q1_runway_to_retail.one_line: runway print tags do not exist; print search interest autocorr(1)=0.88 — cannot test runway->retail

prints.Q2_retail_to_supplier.one_line: prints relate to textile printers/mills; no pure-play listed supplier to map

prints.Q3_tradeable.one_line: no candidate traded >=12 active months (a +-1z signal fires ~4x/yr) — too sparse to evaluate; no tradeable edge

materials.Q1_runway_to_retail.one_line: PROVEN in main study: runway fabric leads H&M/ASOS rack composition +4-12mo (not re-run here)

materials.Q2_retail_to_supplier.one_line: material demand vs fiber/commodity (wool->RELIANCE.NS), best |t|=-4.52 — mostly spurious/wrong-signed per full study

materials.Q3_tradeable.one_line: best-of-240 IR=4.486 (leather->IVL.BK,+2mo) but selection-p=0.095, 0.48 of combos positive
